description_long: This is a single-story suburban house surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several leafy trees. The structure features a mix of flat and slightly sloped roof sections, with a combination of white and beige exterior walls. Large windows are present on multiple sides, including a prominent set of floor-to-ceiling windows on one end, suggesting a living or sunroom area. The front includes a driveway leading to an attached garage, and a clear main entryway is visible, flanked by shrubs and a paved path. The backyard is enclosed by trees, providing privacy and a natural border. The overall design is open and functional, with a focus on indoor-outdoor connectivity and natural light.
description: A single-story suburban house with a mix of flat and sloped roofs, large windows, attached garage, and surrounded by trees and lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entryway, and landscaped front yard with several trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, more private windows, and the house's white exterior walls.
description_view_2: Side view with prominent floor-to-ceiling windows and dense tree coverage along the property edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, a large glass section, and more of the surrounding greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, paved path, minimal steps, and flanked by shrubs; attached garage adjacent.
